en_title: CD Projekt Teases Size and Story of New The Witcher 3 Expansion Songs of the Past
cn_title: CDPR透露《巫师3》新资料片规模与剧情

paragraphs.en: The Witcher 3 developer CD Projekt has dropped its first story hints for the game's upcoming third expansion, Songs of the Past.
paragraphs.cn: 《巫师3》开发商CDPR首次披露即将到来的第三部资料片《往日之歌》(Songs of the Past)的剧情线索。

paragraphs.en: Officially confirmed yesterday, Songs of the Past will arrive for PC, PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X/S in 2027 and once again allow players to take on the role of legendary monster slayer Geralt.
paragraphs.cn: 昨日正式公布的《往日之歌》将于2027年登陆PC、PlayStation 5和Xbox Series X/S平台,玩家将再次扮演传奇猎魔人杰洛特(Geralt)。

paragraphs.en: The expansion will launch 12 years after The Witcher 3's original debut in 2015, and 11 years after the game's second expansion, Blood and Wine, released in 2016. Fans expect its story to also act as something of a bridge to the upcoming The Witcher 4.
paragraphs.cn: 这部资料片将在《巫师3》本体2015年发售的12年后推出,距离2016年发售的第二部资料片《血与酒》(Blood and Wine)整整11年。玩家普遍期待它的剧情能起到承接即将推出的《巫师4》的桥梁作用,后者目前仍未公布发售日。

paragraphs.en: Every CD Projekt Red Game In Development

"We won't give too much away right now because we want you to experience it as you play," senior community and social media manager Laura Beitzel teased today during a 10th anniversary livestream designed to celebrate Blood and Wine.
paragraphs.cn: 「我们现在不会透露太多,因为想让你们在游戏中亲自体验。」CDPR高级社区与社交媒体经理劳拉·拜兹尔(Laura Beitzel)在今日《血与酒》十周年纪念直播中如此预告。

paragraphs.en: "But as a few eagle-eyed people have already seen over the past 24 hours, there are some hints waiting for you on a very important evening in Witcher lore, Belleteyn Night, in our Belleteyn celebration that we shared a few weeks ago. So... keep looking for clues."
paragraphs.cn: 「不过过去24小时里已经有眼尖的玩家发现,我们几周前发布的贝尔泰尼之夜(Belleteyn Night)庆祝插画里其实已经埋了线索。这是巫师世界观里非常重要的一个夜晚——所以,继续找线索吧。」

paragraphs.en: Here, Beitzel is referencing a piece of artwork and a poem it sneakily posted on social media a month ago. It shows Geralt resting by a bonfire as Dandelion plays the lute while villagers dance. More importantly, it shows Geralt with a mysterious new sword — the same sword he's also holding in Songs of the Past's reveal artwork, which sports an unusual ornate curved crossguard.
paragraphs.cn: 拜兹尔指的是CDPR一个月前在社交媒体上悄悄发的一张插画和一首诗。画面中杰洛特靠着篝火休息,亚斯克尔(Dandelion)在弹奏鲁特琴,村民围着篝火起舞。更重要的是,杰洛特手上拿着一把神秘的新剑——这把剑也出现在《往日之歌》的公布插画中,有着不同寻常的弯曲华丽剑格。

paragraphs.en: Belleteyn has been referenced in The Witcher before, and is a fertility festival that takes place each spring. Here is the image's accompanying poem, in case you want to scour it for further clues:
paragraphs.cn: 贝尔泰尼是《巫师》系列中曾经提到过的春日丰收节。下面是这张插画配的诗,如果你想细究其中的线索:

paragraphs.en: On Belleteyn night, when tall fires rise, Whispered wishes go through the quiet skies. A lion cub's fate is penned in the stars, And lilac and gooseberries are never too far. Tonight, there are no monsters to kill, no roads to roam, Just quiet thoughts and wishes that try to find a home. The White Wolf sits still, mesmerized by the dancing flame, While Dandelion strums his lute and hums Geralt's name.
paragraphs.cn: 贝尔泰尼之夜,篝火高燃,/低语的祈愿穿过寂静夜空。/狮崽的命运书写在星辰之间,/紫丁香与醋栗也从未远离。/今夜,没有怪物可杀,没有路途可走,/只有静谧的思绪和寻觅归处的心愿。/白狼静坐,沉醉于跳跃的火焰,/亚斯克尔弹着鲁特琴,轻声吟唱杰洛特的名。

paragraphs.en: "So yes, Geralt is holding a sword," CD Projekt's Amelia Korzycka continued, referencing Songs of the Past's key artwork. "It is a very important sword for the story and you will get to know it when the game comes out."
paragraphs.cn: 「没错,杰洛特确实拿着一把剑,」CDPR的阿米莉亚·科尔泽卡(Amelia Korzycka)继续谈到《往日之歌》的主视觉海报,「这是一把对剧情非常重要的剑,等游戏发售后你们就会了解它。在那之前我们还会有几次直播来揭晓更多细节。」

paragraphs.en: Beitzel also discussed the size of the expansion — and as we heard previously, Songs of the Past is an expansion rather than a smaller DLC or add-on.
paragraphs.cn: 拜兹尔也谈到了这部资料片的体量——正如先前所说,《往日之歌》是一部完整资料片,而非小型DLC或附加包。

paragraphs.en: "Songs of the Past will be aligned with what you're familiar with in Blood and Wine, and what you've come to experience and expect from us when we do our expansions. It's an expansion, let's make it clear."
paragraphs.cn: 「《往日之歌》的体量将和《血与酒》看齐,与玩家对我们资料片的预期一致。它就是资料片,我们要把这一点说清楚。」

paragraphs.en: Today's livestream also included confirmation that Songs of the Past will include more Gwent cards, and that CD Projekt was still working on cross-platform mod support for The Witcher 3, to launch at some point in the future.
paragraphs.cn: 今日直播还确认了《往日之歌》将加入更多昆特牌(Gwent)卡牌,同时CDPR仍在为《巫师3》开发跨平台模组(MOD)支持,未来会择期上线。

paragraphs.en: Finally, CD Projekt's latest financial results have today confirmed a new overall sales total for The Witcher 3, which now stands at 65 million copies sold, up five million from its last count. That number seems likely to rise even further when Songs of the Past launches at some point in 2027.
paragraphs.cn: 最后,CDPR今日发布的最新财报确认了《巫师3》的全新累计销量数据——已达到6500万份,比上一次统计增加了500万份。等2027年《往日之歌》发售后,这个数字预计还会进一步攀升。

opus_summary: CDPR首次披露《巫师3》资料片《往日之歌》的剧情线索,2027年登陆PC/PS5/Xbox Series X/S。CDPR强调这是完整资料片而非DLC,体量将与《血与酒》看齐,故事可能成为通往《巫师4》的桥梁。
